style_effects: Subtle heat haze curls from Ditto's metallic joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished armor. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its seam lines, casting sharp blue-white light that fractures into shimmering metallic dust particles. The aura is a tight, crystalline blue halo with intense, focused luminescence, illuminating the scene in cold, precise beams. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
